name: n8n (with persistent community nodes)
description: Self-hosted n8n workflow automation with community nodes baked into the image so they survive Heroku dyno restarts.

N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Secret key used to encrypt credentials. Auto-generated for you.

DB_TYPE.description: Auto-detected from DATABASE_URL when Heroku Postgres add-on is attached. Leave as postgresdb.

WEBHOOK_URL.description: Public HTTPS URL of this app (e.g. https://my-n8n.herokuapp.com/). Required for webhooks.

N8N_PROTOCOL.description: Protocol n8n advertises. Keep as https on Heroku.

NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_EXTERNAL.description: npm packages usable in Function nodes. * = allow all.

GENERIC_TIMEZONE.description: Timezone used by n8n for schedule/cron triggers. Use a TZ database name, e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo. Defaults to UTC.
